summary: Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed covering root, Staff CRUD (3 types), filters, search, by-bakkal, duplicate prevention, Excel template + import, full Bandobast flow (create→points→selected-staff→allotments with auto-reserved→QR PNG→goshwara→deploy→delete). Frontend: Dashboard, Staff Management (3 tabs switch correctly), Add Staff modal with bilingual labels saved successfully (toast 'Added'), New Bandobast wizard Step 1 renders all 6 input fields with stepper showing all 5 steps. Navy blue #2E3192 theme applied. Marathi+English bilingual labels visible across UI.

issues: Accessibility warning: Missing Description/aria-describedby for DialogContent (non-blocking warning)

action_items: Minor: data-testid in problem statement listed as 'nav-home' but actual is 'nav--home' (double-dash). Other navs use double-dash consistently. Either fix the listed testid in docs or rename for consistency.
Add aria-describedby/Description to Radix DialogContent components to silence accessibility warnings (Add Staff modal etc.).
Console 404 on one resource (likely missing favicon or icon) - cosmetic only.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single 477-line file; consider splitting into routers (staff, bandobast) as it grows.
POST /api/staff returns 200 instead of 201 for created resource - minor REST convention deviation.
set_allotments mutates payload.allotments in-place - functionally fine but not pure.
No pagination on /api/staff (5000 limit) and /api/bandobasts (1000) - acceptable for now but should paginate at scale.
No input length validation on Pydantic models (e.g., bakkal_no, name) - potential data quality issue.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed staff and bandobasts and clean them up via DELETE in teardown / inline delete steps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs in ~4s and covers all listed APIs. Frontend smoke test confirmed Dashboard, Staff tabs, Add Staff modal save, and Wizard Step 1. Wizard steps 2-5 (points, select-staff, allotment, deploy) and Print routes (/print/id-card/:id, /print/duty-pass/:bid/:pid/:sid, /print/goshwara/:id) were not exercised end-to-end via UI - only their backend equivalents were validated. If retesting UI deeper, walk through full 5-step wizard with seeded staff first.
